name: bilig_workpaper_formula_readback
description: Call Bilig WorkPaper, edit one forecast input cell, recalculate formulas, and return verified formula readback proof.
schema: [{"id":0,"property":"baseUrl","description":"Bilig app base URL, for example http://localhost:4321 or your hosted Bilig app","type":"string","required":false},{"id":1,"property":"sheetName","description":"Sheet name, usually Inputs","type":"string","required":true},{"id":2,"property":"address","description":"A1 address to edit, one of B2, B3, B4, or B5","type":"string","required":true},{"id":3,"property":"valueJson","description":"JSON value to write, for example 0.4","type":"string","required":true}]
